channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Need a Mac VPN? Norton VPN just got a serious upgrade that you'd expect it already had
item.description: A kill switch feature finally lands on Norton's macOS app, and the provider is also expected to add it to its iPhone VPN soon. Here's all you need to know.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Hisense Announces Dolby Atmos Wireless Speaker System | TechRadar
item.description: Hisense reveals the HT Saturn, a new speaker system with 4.1.2 channels and Dolby Atmos support
item.dc:creator: james.davidson@futurenet.com (James Davidson), TechRadar

item.title: Google Photos is getting a handy Quick Edit tool for sharing images, and I don’t know why nobody thought of this sooner
item.description: Google is rolling out a new feature for its Photos app called Quick Edit, which allows users to apply image processing on the sharing screen for a last minute touch-up.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Gartner Predicts 21.4% Cloud Spend Growth, but Some Areas Show Questionable Certainty
item.description: Gartner forecasts overall cloud spend to rise 21.4% in 2025, however, the data excludes key areas and shows lower-than-anticipated performance in some categories.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Digital Policeman Initiative Redefines Public Safety in Kazakhstan
item.description: Kazakhstan's Digital Policeman initiative is revolutionizing public safety with state-of-the-art technologies, positioning the country as a leader in law enforcement innovation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Ireland’s AI data centers are sucking up too much of the country’s energy
item.description: Ireland is still heavily reliant on burning fossil fuels to generate electricity, despite a growing number of wind farms sprouting across the countryside. Further data center expansion threatens Ireland's goals to sharply cut planet-warming emissions.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bernie Sanders blasts 'President Elon Musk' for derailing spending deal
item.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.) took aim at tech mogul Elon Musk for saying any lawmaker supporting the newly unveiled end-of-the-year continuing resolution funding deal should be voted out of office. "Democrats and Republicans spent months negotiating a bipartisan agreement to fund our government.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, The Hill

item.title: GitHub launches free tier of Copilot AI coding assistant
item.description: GitHub has launched GitHub Copilot Free, providing access to a free tier of the AI-based pair programmer via Microsoft’s Visual Studio Code editor. Announced December 18, Copilot Free gives developers access to 2,000 code completions and 50 chat messages monthly.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2
item.description: Army PEO C3N is obtaining industry feedback as part of its market research as it develops solicitations for the next generation command and control effort. The post Army lays out high level concepts for next-gen C2 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: OpenAI rolls out upgrade to reasoning model, new dev tools
item.description: The release Tuesday by OpenAI of OpenA1 o1, its reasoning model, in API, along with three new sets of tools for developers, is a “smart move that keeps [it] in the corporate/enterprise conversation, as so many customers are shifting their focus towards agentic applications over simpler chat-based ap
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Elon Musk: Anyone who votes for spending deal should lose reelection
item.description: Tech mogul Elon Musk continued his tirade against the newly unveiled end-of-year funding deal Wednesday, calling for any lawmaker who supports the continuing resolution to be voted out of office.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Barcelona subway recycles energy from braking into power to charge electric cars
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — The Barcelona subway grinds to a halt, the doors slide open and commuters pour out to go about their daily business. Little do they know that as they do so, a burst of energy is sent up to street level to help charge an electric car.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blood in the iPhones? Apple faces criminal charges
item.description: Apple has been accused of knowingly financing a trade characterized by atrocities in criminal litigation launched by the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC). It relates to use of so-called “blood minerals” in its devices.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: US moves to tighten restrictions on China Telecom amid security fears
item.description: The US Commerce Department is intensifying its actions against China Telecom’s US unit over concerns that its cloud and internet services could be used to funnel American data to Beijing, according to a Reuters report.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 6 sneaky scams that could ruin your holiday season
item.description: Beware of these six sneaky holiday scams. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives you tips to avoid falling victim.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 10 quantum computing milestones of 2024
item.description: There was a time, back in the early days of computing, when we had vacuum tubes, relays, mechanical gears plus several different types of analog computers. We’re kind of in that same era today with quantum computers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Schumer calls for Mayorkas to ‘deploy special drone-detection tech’ in New York, New Jersey
item.description: “I’m pushing for answers amid these drone sightings,” Schumer posted on X. “I’m calling for @SecMayorkas to deploy special drone-detection tech across NY and NJ.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: How to delete multiple emails at once on Android
item.description: Cut through all the digital clutter and delete multiple emails from your Android simultaneously. Kurt the CyberGuy explains how it's done.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Your phone got hacked and now someone's got control of it. What to do immediately
item.description: Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson lays out the immediate steps you should take if your phone has been hacked and your personal information becomes vulnerable.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft’s Patch Tuesday updates: Keeping up with the latest fixes
item.description: Long before Taco Tuesday became part of the pop-culture vernacular, Tuesdays were synonymous with security — and for anyone in the tech world, they still are.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sophia, a famous robot and global icon of AI, wins hearts at Zimbabwe's innovation fair
item.description: HARARE, Zimbabwe (AP) — From answering questions from Cabinet ministers, academics and students on climate change, substance abuse and the law to children’s inquiries about her “birth” and links to God and being described as a talkative feminist, Sophia, the world-famous robot won hearts at an innov
item.dc:creator: BY FARAI MUTSAKA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, Fox 5
